## Validation

Run the broadest safe gate:

```bash
npm run check
```

If this is too broad, explain why and run the focused commands from `REPO_PROFILE.json`.

## Closeout

Return:

- files changed
- commands run and results
- assumptions
- unresolved blockers
- deferred work
